mapper.insert: INSERT INTO dashboard_metric_hour ( stat_hour, book_total, stock_total, available_stock_total, borrowing_total, returned_total, overdue_total, enabled_user_total, login_success_count, login_failure_count, oper_success_count, oper_failure_count, create_time, update_time ) VALUES ( #{statHour}, #{bookTotal}, #{stockTotal}, #{availableStockTotal}, #{borrowingTotal}, #{returnedTotal}, #{overdueTotal}, #{enabledUserTotal}, #{loginSuccessCount}, #{loginFailureCount}, #{operSuccessCount}, #{operFailureCount}, NOW(), NOW() ) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE book_total = VALUES(book_total), stock_total = VALUES(stock_total), available_stock_total = VALUES(available_stock_total), borrowing_total = VALUES(borrowing_total), returned_total = VALUES(returned_total), overdue_total = VALUES(overdue_total), enabled_user_total = VALUES(enabled_user_total), login_success_count = VALUES(login_success_count), login_failure_count = VALUES(login_failure_count), oper_success_count = VALUES(oper_success_count), oper_failure_count = VALUES(oper_failure_count), update_time = NOW()
mapper.select: SELECT DATE_FORMAT(stat_hour, '%Y-%m-%d %H:00:00') AS timeBucket, DATE_FORMAT(stat_hour, '%m-%d %H:00') AS label, book_total AS bookTotal, stock_total AS stockTotal, available_stock_total AS availableStockTotal, borrowing_total AS borrowingTotal, returned_total AS returnedTotal, overdue_total AS overdueTotal, enabled_user_total AS enabledUserTotal, login_success_count AS loginSuccessCount, login_failure_count AS loginFailureCount, oper_success_count AS operSuccessCount, oper_failure_count AS operFailureCount FROM dashboard_metric_hour WHERE stat_hour >= #{startHour} ORDER BY stat_hour ASC
